chapterSummaries.1: Trials produce perseverance, ask God for wisdom, faith without works is dead
chapterSummaries.2: Do not show favoritism, faith without deeds is useless
chapterSummaries.3: Taming the tongue, wisdom from above is pure and peaceable
chapterSummaries.4: Submit to God, resist the devil, do not judge your brother
chapterSummaries.5: Warning to the rich, patience in suffering, pray for one another
